message:
test(fsqlite-parser): add comprehensive Pratt precedence validation for all 11 operator levels (bd-kzat)

Adds 21 tests covering: OR/AND associativity, NOT vs AND boundary, equality
left-associativity, the critical a=b<c boundary (equality vs relational),
relational/bitwise/add/mul/concat associativity, level boundaries, COLLATE
postfix, unary tightest binding, ESCAPE as LIKE suffix, JSON highest infix,
error recovery, and full 11-level complex expression drill-down.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
